titles.text: Aztec: The Curse in the Heart of the City of Gold
Aztecas: La Maldición de la ciudad del oro
Aztec : Malédiction au cœur de la cité d'or

descriptions.text: Aztec: The Curse in the Heart of the City of Gold (French: Aztec: Malédiction au cœur de la cité d'or, also known as The Sacred Amulet in North America) is a 1999 adventure game designed for Windows, PlayStation and iOS. It was developed by and published by Cryo Interactive (ported to the PS1 by Tek 5) and licensed by Wanadoo Edition.
Aztec : Malédiction au cœur de la cité d'or est un jeu vidéo développé par Cryo Interactive, sorti en 1999 sur PC et en 2000 sur PlayStation.

Aztec: Maledizione nel cuore della città d'oro (nome originale Aztec : Malédiction au cœur de la cité d'or in francese) è un videogioco d'avventura punta e clicca progettato per PlayStation e Windows, sviluppato dalla Cryo Interactive e co-distribuito dalla Cryo e dalla Wanadoo Edition (e dalla Microïds per la versione iOS).

アステカ：黄金都市の心に宿る呪い（フランス語：Aztec: Malédiction au cœur de la cité d'or、別名：The Sacred Amulet in North America）は、1999年にWindows、PlayStation、iOS向けに開発されたアドベンチャーゲームです。Cryo Interactiveが開発・発売し（PS1版はTek 5が移植）、Wanadoo Editionがライセンス供与を行いました。
